title: Market Bracket Definition
description: Temperature bracket definitions for a Kalshi or Polymarket weather series. Each bracket defines a price range that settles YES if the settlement value falls in [min, max). Used by client.brackets(series_ticker).

series_ticker.description: Exchange series identifier (e.g. 'HIGHNY' for Kalshi NYC high temp).

settlement_field.description: Which CLI field settles this series: 'high_temp_f' or 'low_temp_f'.

min_f.description: Lower bound (inclusive) in °F. Null = open lower bound.

max_f.description: Upper bound (exclusive) in °F. Null = open upper bound.

fetched_at.description: When this bracket definition was retrieved (RFC3339 UTC).

$comment: STUB: client.brackets() raises NotImplementedError until Sprint 3 (Kalshi integration). Schema provided for forward compatibility and AI agent planning.
